turns.question: Would you like that with any milk alternatives?
turns.questionKo: 혹시 다른 우유 대용으로 드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, could you use oat milk instead?
turns.answerKo: 네, 오트 밀크로 바꿔 주실 수 있나요?

turns.question: Sure thing. How many shots would you like in your drink?
turns.questionKo: 네, 그럼 음료에 몇 샷 넣으실 거예요?
turns.answer: I'll take a triple shot today, I need the energy.
turns.answerKo: 오늘은 트리플 샷으로 할게요. 에너지 좀 필요해서요.

turns.question: Long day ahead? Would you like it extra hot as well?
turns.questionKo: 오늘 하루 길죠? 더 따뜻하게 해드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes please, extra hot, thank you.
turns.answerKo: 네, 부탁드려요. 아주 뜨겁게 해주세요, 감사합니다.

turns.question: Do you want that with less ice too, since it's hot?
turns.questionKo: 날이 더운데 얼음은 좀 적게 넣어 드릴까요?
turns.answer: Actually, this one's not iced, so that's fine.
turns.answerKo: 아니요, 이건 아이스 음료가 아니라서 괜찮아요.

turns.question: Right, my mistake. Would you like an extra pump of caramel?
turns.questionKo: 아, 제가 실수했네요. 카라멜 시럽 한 번 더 추가해 드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, extra pump would be perfect, thanks.
turns.answerKo: 네, 시럽 한 번 더 넣어주시면 딱 좋겠어요, 고맙습니다.

turns.question: Perfect, I'll get that triple shot oat milk latte started.
turns.questionKo: 알겠습니다. 트리플 샷 오트 밀크 라떼 바로 만들어 드릴게요.
turns.answer: Thank you, that sounds exactly right.

turns.question: Would you like a sugar-free syrup instead of regular?
turns.questionKo: 설탕 없는 시럽으로 바꾸실래요?
turns.answer: Yes, sugar-free vanilla would be perfect.

turns.question: Do you want that blended thinner or thicker than usual?
turns.questionKo: 평소보다 좀 더 묽게 갈아드릴까요, 아니면 진하게요?
turns.answer: A bit thinner, if that's possible.

turns.question: No problem. Would you like extra whipped cream on top?
turns.questionKo: 괜찮아요. 휘핑크림 많이 올려 드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, please, pile it on.

turns.question: Ha, you got it. How would you like your foam, light or thick?
turns.questionKo: 네, 알겠어요. 거품은 가볍게 할까요, 아니면 두껍게 할까요?
turns.answer: Thick foam, please, I love that part.
turns.answerKo: 거품을 두껍게 해주세요. 그 부분이 제일 좋아요.

turns.question: Perfect, sounds like a real treat today.
turns.questionKo: 완벽하네요. 오늘 정말 특별한 음료가 될 것 같아요.
turns.answer: It really is, I've been looking forward to this all week.
turns.answerKo: 진짜 그래요. 이번 주 내내 이걸 기다렸거든요.

turns.question: Would you like your drink with less sweetener today?
turns.questionKo: 오늘 단맛을 좀 덜하게 해드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, please, half the usual amount.

turns.question: Sure. Do you want an extra drizzle of caramel on top still?
turns.questionKo: 네. 위에 카라멜 시럽 한 번 더 뿌려 드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, please, that's my favorite part.

turns.question: Understood. Would you like it with almond milk foam?
turns.questionKo: 알겠습니다. 아몬드 밀크 거품으로 해드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, almond milk foam sounds great.

turns.question: Do you want a little cinnamon sprinkled on top as well?
turns.questionKo: 위에 계피 가루 살짝 뿌려 드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, a sprinkle would be nice, thank you.
turns.answerKo: 네, 위에 살짝 뿌려주시면 좋을 것 같아요, 감사합니다.

turns.question: Perfect, that's a great combination you've put together.
turns.questionKo: 완벽해요, 정말 좋은 조합이네요.
turns.answer: Thanks, I've been experimenting with different orders lately.
turns.answerKo: 감사해요. 요즘 주문을 이것저것 바꿔보면서 실험 중이거든요.

turns.question: Well, this one sounds like a winner to me.
turns.questionKo: 음, 이대로 주문할게요.
turns.answer: I hope so, I'm excited to try it.

turns.question: Would you like your matcha extra strong today?
turns.questionKo: 말차 좀 진하게 해드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, please, extra strong today.

turns.question: Do you want that with two percent milk or something else?
turns.questionKo: 2% 우유로 할까요, 아니면 다른 걸 원하세요?
turns.answer: Two percent works perfectly, thanks.

turns.question: Would you like it topped with cold foam as well?
turns.questionKo: 콜드 폼 올려 드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, cold foam sounds great today.

turns.question: Perfect, and would you like it a little sweeter than usual?
turns.questionKo: 네, 평소보다 단맛을 좀 더 강하게 해드릴까요?
turns.answer: Yes, a little sweeter would be nice.
turns.answerKo: 좀 더 달았으면 좋을 것 같아요.

turns.question: Got it, I'll get that strong sweet matcha ready for you.
turns.questionKo: 알겠습니다. 진하고 달콤한 말차 바로 준비해 드릴게요.
turns.answer: Thank you, that sounds like exactly what I need.
